vllm.title: [Core] Remove unnecessary copies in flash attn backend
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
With vllm-flash-attn == 2.5.8.post3, we can remove the unnecessary copies in flash attn backend by using the out kwarg directly.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Pass a device pointer into the quantize kernel for the scales
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR changes the int8 static quantize kernel so it takes a torch::Tensor instead of a float for the scale. This lets us keep it on the device in order to avoid calling item on the tensor, which causes a synchronization between the CPU and GPU and breaks CUDA graphs.
With this PR plus #5137, vllm

vllm.title: New CI template on AWS stack
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add new test template that runs on new queues on AWS stack
Docker pushes to public ECR repo instead of GAR
Docker build step & Intel CPU test step run on cpu_queue
All GPU test steps run on gpu_1_queue or gpu_4_queue with Docker plugin (using the image built in the first step)

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Support `prompt_logprobs==0`
vllm.author: toslunar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes prompt_logprobs==0 work again. SamplingParams.prompt_logprobs is None or a non-negative int as documented at https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/v0.4.3/vllm/sampling_params.py#L238-L240.
FIX #5213 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.author: afeldman-nm

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix torch.compile() error when using MultiprocessingGPUExecutor
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
torch.compile() by default will use a process pool for async compiling which doesn't work with MultiprocessingGPUExecutor. Models uses torch.compile() like commandr therefore won't work:
